introSection: Storm was a steel roller coaster located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK. It was a Pinfari RC40 model and had red track and white supports. When it operated and what happened to it after it left Peter Pan's Playground is not known.
fullText: Storm was a steel roller coaster located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK. It was a Pinfari RC40 model and had red track and white supports. When it operated and what happened to it after it left Peter Pan's Playground is not known.
